action_text: Select "Short description" in the list’s field dropdown next to the Search box
rationale: Use the list’s field-specific quick search to filter by Short description; first select the correct field.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-1f711cdf-2" into the list Search box
rationale: After choosing Short description as the search field, input the target string to filter matching rows.

action_text: Press Enter in the Search box to execute the filter
rationale: Apply the quick search filter after entering the value to refresh the list to matching records.

action_text: Click the "Show / hide filter" button to open the filter builder
rationale: Open the advanced filter builder to create an explicit condition on Short description (contains), aligning with the goal.

action_text: Click the "Show column search row" button to reveal column-specific filters
rationale: Alternatively, enable the per-column search row to filter directly under the Short description column.
